metaTitle: Tweet Generator — Realistic Fake Tweet Maker (100% Private)
metaDescription: Create high-fidelity fake tweets and X posts instantly. Customize name, handles, verified badges, and stats. 100% private — your images never touch a server.
introSummary: Our professional Tweet Generator is the ultimate creative suite for content creators, memers, and digital marketers. Engineered to replicate the authentic X (formerly Twitter) interface with pixel-perfect precision, our tool allows you to craft realistic-looking posts for humor, storytelling, or visual concepts. Built with a 'Privacy-First' architecture, every profile picture you upload and every word you type is processed locally in your browser, ensuring your creative assets remain entirely your own.

contextUsage.title: For Meme Creators & Humor
contextUsage.desc: Generate hilarious 'what-if' scenarios or parody tweets from celebrities and fictional characters to entertain your followers.

contextUsage.title: For Digital Marketing & Prototypes
contextUsage.desc: Visualize how your brand's message or ad copy will look in the wild before hitting 'Publish' on official channels.

contextUsage.title: For Storytelling & Roleplay
contextUsage.desc: Enhance your digital narratives or social media alternate reality games (ARGs) with realistic post screenshots.

howto.description: Enter the display name, @username, and toggle the 'Verified' badge to match the identity you want to simulate.
Type your tweet text. Our generator fully supports emojis and long-form content, wrapping text exactly like the real platform.
Input custom numbers for Retweets, Quotes, Likes, and Views to give your fake tweet a sense of viral scale.
Choose between Light, Dim, or Dark themes, then click 'Download PNG' to save your high-resolution screenshot instantly.

why: Pixel-Perfect Realism — Meticulously designed to mirror the latest X (Twitter) typography, spacing, and iconography for an authentic look.
100% Private Processing — We use local browser rendering. Your uploaded profile photos and text are never sent to a server or stored.
Light & Dark Mode Support — Switch between the classic white, 'Dim' blue, or 'Lights Out' black themes to match any user preference.
Verified Badge Toggle — Add the blue or gold checkmark to your profile with a single click for that official aesthetic.
No Watermarks & Free — Create and download an unlimited number of high-quality screenshots without intrusive branding or hidden costs.
Works Offline — The entire generation engine lives in your browser, allowing you to create content anywhere, even without an internet connection.

faq.q: Is my uploaded profile picture safe?
faq.a: Absolutely. Our tool uses the 'File API' to load your image locally. It never leaves your computer, making it the safest generator on the web.

faq.q: Can I add images to the tweet itself?
faq.a: Currently, our tool focuses on text-based tweets with custom profile icons to ensure the fastest rendering and highest privacy.

faq.q: What is the best image size for the avatar?
faq.a: We recommend a square image of at least 400x400 pixels for a crisp, high-definition look on the generated screenshot.

faq.q: Does this tool support the new 'X' branding?
faq.a: Yes! We stay updated with the latest UI changes, including the 'X' logo and modern iconography used on the platform today.

faq.q: Is it legal to use fake tweets?
faq.a: This tool is for entertainment, parody, and creative brainstorming only. Please do not use it to spread misinformation, defame individuals, or deceive others.

technicalSpecs.useCase: Ultra-sharp text for high-DPI displays and social sharing
Perfectly matches official color hex codes (#000000, #15202b, etc.)
Works on all modern desktops and smartphones

troubleshooting: Font looks slightly different? The tool uses 'Chirp' and system fallback fonts to mimic the official platform. Ensure your browser is up to date.
Image download not starting? Some mobile 'In-App' browsers block direct downloads. Try opening the tool in a standalone browser like Safari or Chrome.
Text cutting off? If you have an extremely long username or name, it may truncate just like it does on the real X interface.
proTips: Memer Tip: Match the date and time of your fake tweet to the context of your joke to make it look 100% believable.
Dark Mode Hack: Use the 'Lights Out' theme for memes intended for Reddit or Discord—it looks much sleeker in those environments.
Quality Tip: After downloading, use our 'Image Compressor' if you need to fit the screenshot into a strict file size limit for certain forums.
